title: Neoporteria esmeraldana
taxonomy: Neoporteria esmeraldana is classified as a species of cactus in the family Cactaceae. It is a type of tree-like cactus native to Ecuador. Within the Cactaceae family, Neoporteria esmeraldana belongs to the subfamily Cactoideae. The genus Neoporteria is part of the tribe Cacteae. More specifically, Neoporteria esmeraldana is further classified into the subtribe Cactinae.
